{{Quote|Ah! Happy are Ergesh to see visitors come! Ergesh home is visitors' home. Act accordingly! Consume much food! Drink much fluid amounts! Seek comfort!|An Ergesh to an off-worlder visitor|<ref name="Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two">''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ergesh''' were an [[Homeworld/Legends|indigenous]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ergeshui/Legends|Ergeshui]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Ergesh were one of the few [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that evolved from [[Plant/Legends|plant]]-based organisms on their swampy [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. They were two meters tall and resembled shambling mounds made up of plant materials and had droopy slimy appendages of various lengths and sizes. A fully grown Ergesh could weigh up to a half of a metric ton. They had an average lifespan of 200 [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]].<ref name="AE" /> Their [[Color/Legends|coloration]] consisted of green, brown, and gray. The younger Ergesh had more green, the elders more brown. A strong smell of ammonia and rotting vegetation followed an Ergesh wherever the being went.<ref name="AE" />

[[Reproduction/Legends|Reproduction]] was accomplished asexually through two Ergesh each planting a seed from their bodies in a [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]] called the ''[[Shoolbloorp]]'', the "Land of Beginnings," during a special mating ceremony. Twenty [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, a young Ergesh rose up from the ground, self-aware and ready to join the society. Each Ergesh could produce one seed every two Ergeshui years.<ref name="AE" />

[[File:Ergesh-AE.png|thumb|left|200px|An Ergesh individual]]
Despite their bulk and weight, they could float on [[Water/Legends|water]]. Due to their physiology, they could breathe underwater, though they preferred "dry" land. Their wet, thick skin also acted as a strong protective layer against weapons.<ref name="AE" />

Ergesh did not have faces in the accepted sense of the word. A number of the smaller tentacles were actually [[opticstalk]]s, the Ergesh equivalent of [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], while others were sensitive to sound waves. They could not become [[Alcohol/Legends|intoxicated]], drugged, or [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] by most substances. Their immune systems broke down such substances quickly, and their natural secretions carried out the harmful or waste elements.<ref name="AE" /> The Ergesh could consume [[Kaloob]] in order to cleanse themselves from harmful microorganisms.

Ergesh were not fast and were poor combatants, with their most effective attack being simply trampling over their opponents.

==Society and culture==
[[File:Ergesh_workers.jpg|thumb|right|250px|An Ergesh at work]]
Ergesh were highly intelligent, curious, and gentle beings. Their native language was said to sound like thick mud coming out of a rapid boil, though most members of the species preferred to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Ergesh personal names were long affairs, with many odd bubbling noises included. Fortunately for other species, they tolerated being given nicknames by off-worlders they interacted with.<ref name="AE" />

Once every year, on Ergeshui, came a day when both [[Moon/Legends|moons]] were aligned in a certain way, with devastating effect upon the Ergesh. During this period, they acted irrational, violent, or even insane.

Ergesh were divided into clans, which had formed a federation that ruled their planet. There were a total of 80 clans, each with about 10,000 members. The eldest Ergesh from each clan was a part of the governing body. This government met monthly in the [[Communal Pool]]. The Ergesh federation kept in regular contact with the leaders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

As a reflection of their biology, Ergesh culture had no concept of [[Gender/Legends|gender]]. In their dealings with each other, Ergesh were honest and fair. They were a society with no classes, no discrimination, and no wants. There was no crime among the species.<ref name="AE" />

The Ergesh possessed amazing bio-technology which included living [[Starship/Legends|starships]] called [[Starjumper]]s. Their weapons were small plant buds that could be thrown at a target and would deliver an electrical shock on contact. Their buildings were all organic, and semi-sentient enough to recognize residents and block intruders from entering.<ref name="AE" />
